description: Questions with ground-truth SQL against the seeded sample DB. Execution accuracy compares result sets order-insensitively, since the model may choose a different (equally valid) ordering or column names.

items.question: How many products cost more than 100 dollars?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE unit_price > 100

items.question: List the names of customers from Germany.
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE country = 'Germany'

items.question: How many orders were placed in March 2026?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date LIKE '2026-03%'

items.question: How many orders have been returned?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'returned'

items.question: What are the top 3 products by total revenue?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3

items.question: Which customer has placed the most orders?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, c.name LIMIT 1

items.question: What is the total revenue across all orders?
What is the average unit price per product category?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT category, AVG(unit_price) FROM products GROUP BY category

items.question: How many distinct customers have placed at least one order?
What is the revenue from orders with status shipped?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'shipped'

items.question: Which product category sold the most units?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.category FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC LIMIT 1
